name: Health-Track
description: A personal medical record app enabling users to store health data offline, track medications, and upload prescriptions

name: E-cloud
description: Built a clean product catalog with intuitive categories/subcategories, add-to-cart functionality, and Wishlist saving for seamless shopping. Implemented smooth navigation between product listings, detailed views, and checkout preparation.

name: Movie Night
description: Transform your entertainment experience with our movie app. Discover a vast library of films, explore curated recommendations, and stay updated on the latest releases, all within a user-friendly interface designed for cinephiles.

name: Chatty
description: Connect with friends and family effortlessly through our intuitive chat app. Stay in touch with real-time messaging features.
